title: Efficacy of docetaxel addition to next-generation androgen receptor-axis-targeted therapies and androgen deprivation therapy in metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer: A tumor volume-specific analysis.
abstract: The effectiveness of docetaxel in addition to next-generation androgen receptor-axis-targeted therapies and androgen deprivation therapy (ADT) for metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer (mHSPC) remains unclear. We evaluated the efficacy of this combination through tumor volume-specific analysis.
